sections.summary: Aspiring Computer Science and Engineering student with a strong interest in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Web Development. Experienced in academic projects involving web applications, machine learning models, and algorithm-based systems. Good foundation in programming, data analysis, andproblem-solving, with a focus on applying theoretical knowledge to real-world problems. Seeking opportunities to enhance technical expertise and contribute to innovative technology solutions.
sections.skills: Programming Languages: Java, Python Web Technologies: HTML, CSS Databases: MySQL (Basic) Machine Learning: Scikit-learn (Basics), Data Preprocessing, Model Evaluation Core Concepts: Object-Oriented Programming,Data Structures (Basic) Tools: Git, VS Code, Jupyter Notebook
sections.projects: SOT Student Grievance Management Programming : Java, Python : HTML, CSS : MySQL (Basic) Scikit-learn (Basics), Data Preprocessing, Model Evaluation : Object-Oriented Programming,Data Structures (Basic) Git, VS Code, Jupyter NotebookAuthenticity Analysis of Real and AI-Generated Images Using Deep LearningDeveloped a deep learning system to detect whether images are real or AI-generated using CNN and transfer learning. Trained the model on the CIFAKE dataset and evaluated performance using metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, and confusion matrix. Built a web interface for real-time image verification, achieving 97.67% classification accuracy. Campus Shuttle Routing & Capacity Scheduling Disease Diagnosis using Machine LearningBuilt a machine learning model using Python and Scikit-learn to predict diabetes using the PIMA Indian Diabetes Dataset. Performed data preprocessing and feature selection and implemented a Random Forest classifier, achieving ~74% prediction accuracy.Designed an optimized campus transportation routing system using graph-based modelingand the Greedy Nearest Neighbor algorithm. Improved route planning efficiency while considering bus capacity and scheduling constraints. Social Event Management Web ApplicationDeveloped a web-based platform connecting customers with event service providers.Implemented service search, booking, rating, and location-based recommendations with a database to manage users, services, bookings, and feedback.
sections.experience: Collaborated in team-based academic projects,contributing to planning, development, and implementation. Presented research findings and project outcomes in internal evaluations. Applied classroom concepts to real-world problems through practical projects.
